title: <div>  •  Purging a unique archetype reverts them to base level with a heavy pen
content:
• Purging a unique archetype reverts them to base level with a heavy penalty.
• If unclaimed at first, a student will be randomly assigned the role at a critical moment.

✔ Examples of Unique Archetypes & Purge Consequences:
• The Oracle → Purging results in permanent blindness (figuratively or in a game sense).
• The Executioner → Purging results in total loss of offensive abilities.
• The False Prophet → Purging erases all XP they’ve accumulated.
• The Exiled Monarch → Purging makes them permanently factionless.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures unique roles maintain their impact and are not thrown around lightly.
✔ Provides a way out, but with immense sacrifice.
✔ Encourages long-term strategic thinking when choosing an archetype.

📜 3. Fate Wheel Manipulation – Limited & Archetype-Specific
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 524 (chunk 524/555)
